query:
WITH combined AS (
            SELECT 'post' as content_type, id, title, content_raw, created_at, echo_count, comment_count
            FROM posts WHERE user_id = $1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT 'question', id, title, content_raw, created_at, echo_count, comment_count
            FROM questions WHERE user_id = $1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT 'answer', id, NULL, content_raw, created_at, echo_count, comment_count
            FROM answers WHERE user_id = $1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT 'refract', id, NULL, content_raw, created_at, echo_count, 0
            FROM refracts WHERE user_id = $1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
        )
        SELECT 
            content_type as "content_type!",
            id as "id!",
            title,
            content_raw as "content_raw!",
            created_at as "created_at!",
            echo_count as "echo_count!",
            comment_count as "comment_count!"
        FROM combined
        WHERE ($2::INTEGER IS NULL OR id < $2)
        ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
        LIMIT $3
